title: ebenus micrantha
intro: Ebenus micrantha, also known as the dwarf cornel, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ebenus micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used in the form of dried flowers and roots.
